## Checklist

- [ ] `npm run lint` passes with no errors
- [ ] `npm run type-check` passes with no errors
- [ ] No new `any` types introduced
- [ ] Mobile layout checked (375px)
- [ ] No console errors in dev
- [ ] Lighthouse score ≥ 90 on all categories (for new pages)
- [ ] Images use `next/image` with explicit dimensions
- [ ] All new interactive elements are keyboard-accessible
- [ ] Colour contrast ≥ 4.5:1 for body text
- [ ] No client secrets or `.env` values committed
